seo.title: Free AI Tools
seo.description: Free interactive AI tools: ROI Calculator and AI Readiness Assessment. Evaluate your business potential with AI.

hero.title: Free AI Tools
hero.subtitle: Interactive tools to help you evaluate AI opportunities and measure potential impact on your business.

sections.title: Choose a Tool
sections.subtitle: Select a tool to get started with your AI evaluation.

hoursPerWeek.label: Hours spent on repetitive tasks per week (per employee)

roiCalculator.disclaimer: These estimates are based on industry averages. Actual results may vary depending on your specific business processes and implementation scope.

cta.title: Want a precise ROI analysis for your business?
cta.subtitle: Our team will analyse your specific workflows and provide a detailed, customised assessment with actionable recommendations.

1.text: How would you describe your organization's current data infrastructure?
options: We have minimal digital data
We have some digital systems but data is siloed
We have centralized data with some integration
We have a modern data platform with strong integration

2.text: How does your leadership view AI adoption?
options: AI is not on the radar
There's curiosity but no commitment
Leadership is supportive and has allocated exploratory budget
AI is a strategic priority with dedicated investment

3.text: What is your team's current technical capability with AI?
options: No AI or data science expertise
Basic awareness, some self-taught exploration
Some team members with AI/ML experience
Dedicated AI/data science team or strong partnerships

4.text: How much of your workflow involves repetitive, manual processes?
options: Almost everything is manual
Many processes are manual with some automation
Most routine tasks are automated
Fully automated with minimal manual intervention

5.text: How do you currently handle customer interactions?
options: Entirely manual (phone, email)
Some self-service tools (FAQ, basic forms)
Multi-channel with some automated responses
AI-assisted with intelligent routing and automation

6.text: What is your approach to data-driven decision making?
options: Decisions are mostly intuition-based
We use basic reporting and spreadsheets
We have dashboards and regular analytics
We use predictive analytics and data models

7.text: How would you describe your IT infrastructure?
options: Legacy systems, mostly on-premises
Mix of legacy and some cloud services
Primarily cloud-based with modern APIs
Cloud-native with microservices architecture

8.text: What is your organization's attitude toward change?
options: Resistant to change
Open but slow to adopt
Actively pursuing innovation
Change is part of our culture

9.text: How do you handle sensitive data and compliance?
options: No formal data governance
Basic policies exist but aren't consistently followed
Formal data governance with regular audits
Comprehensive compliance program (GDPR, etc.) with automated controls

10.text: What is your budget outlook for technology investments?
options: Very limited, no room for new tools
Small budget for pilots and experiments
Moderate budget for strategic initiatives
Significant budget with clear ROI expectations

emailGate.title: Your results are ready!
emailGate.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a detailed AI readiness report with personalized recommendations.

cta.title: Get a Personalized AI Strategy
cta.subtitle: Let our team analyze your specific situation and build a tailored roadmap for AI adoption.

early.name: Early Stage
early.description: Your organization is at the beginning of the AI journey. Focus on data infrastructure and building awareness.
steps: Audit your current data systems and identify gaps
Start collecting and organizing key business data
Schedule an AI awareness workshop for your leadership team

developing.name: Developing
developing.description: You have some foundations in place. Quick wins in automation could build momentum for broader AI adoption.
steps: Identify 2-3 repetitive processes ripe for automation
Pilot an AI tool in a low-risk area to build confidence
Develop a basic data strategy to unify siloed information

ready.name: Ready
ready.description: Your organization is well-positioned for AI implementation. A strategic roadmap will help you prioritize high-impact use cases.
steps: Build an AI roadmap aligned with business objectives
Evaluate and deploy AI solutions for your top 3 use cases
Invest in upskilling your team on AI tools and workflows

advanced.name: Advanced
advanced.description: You are ready for sophisticated AI solutions. Focus on advanced use cases, AI agents, and scaling existing capabilities.
steps: Deploy autonomous AI agents for complex workflows
Scale successful AI initiatives across all departments
Explore custom AI models tailored to your industry data
